features-desc: Our furniture, designed for the needs of modern life, is manufactured with the latest technology and high-quality materials.
feature1-desc: Premium quality with matte wood surfaces and stainless steel details.
feature2-desc: Drawer and door systems with soft-close functionality.
feature3-desc: Customizable modular structure that adapts to every space.
menu-desc: Discover our furniture solutions for every area of your home. From modern kitchens to elegant bathrooms, from bookcases to wardrobes, we are here with our wide collection.
menu-text1: Kitchen cabinets designed with minimalist lines and modern details.
menu-text2: Add value to your bathroom with stylish and functional bathroom cabinets.
menu-text3: Make the most of your space with smart organization systems.
menu-text4: Modern design that brings order and aesthetics to your home.
about-p1: Narmanlı Furniture has been a pioneer in furniture production since 2000, with its industry experience and commitment to quality craftsmanship. Our mission is to meet our customers' needs with the most suitable designs, bringing aesthetic and functionality together in living spaces.
about-p2: The high-quality materials used in our products allow us to offer long-lasting and eco-friendly solutions.
about-p3: As Narmanlı Furniture, we aim to be not just a furniture manufacturer, but a solution partner that adds value to your living spaces. With our high customer satisfaction approach, we make it our principle to exceed customer expectations in every project.
about-p4: If you want to create a perfect transformation in your home or office with Narmanlı Furniture, you can contact us to discover our innovative and elegant designs.
review1: I had custom-made kitchen cabinets built by Narmanlı Furniture according to the dimensions of my kitchen, and they are exactly what I dreamed of. I am very satisfied with both the craftsmanship and the functional design. This kitchen, prepared with workshop care, has become the most pleasant place in my home; I definitely recommend it!
review2: I had a custom-designed wardrobe made for my room by Narmanlı Furniture. The fine craftsmanship and functional solutions exceeded my expectations; it fits my room perfectly with both its elegance and ease of use.
review3: I planned and had a cloakroom made by Narmanlı Furniture workshop, exactly in the dimensions and compartments I wanted. Thanks to their practical solutions and attention to detail, my entrance area has become much more organized and spacious. I highly recommend them to anyone looking for custom-made production.
contact-email-title: Please enter a valid email address.
blog1-title: How to Achieve Elegance with Kitchen Cabinet Doors?
blog1-text: Kitchen furniture doors are one of the most important elements of kitchen design, both aesthetically and functionally. With the right material and design choice, you can achieve elegance and order in your kitchen at the same time.
blog2-title: What to Consider When Choosing a Nightstand?
blog2-text: When choosing a nightstand, it is important to consider both aesthetics and functionality. The right size can change the atmosphere of your room and provide additional storage spaces such as drawers or shelves according to your needs.
blog3-title: What to Consider When Choosing a Bathroom Cabinet?
blog3-text: When choosing a bathroom cabinet, preferring water-resistant materials ensures long-lasting use. Additionally, compact designs and storage solutions such as shelves or drawers are important for efficient use of space.
kurumsal-p1: Narmanlı Furniture considers its employees, customers, social stakeholders and all people as the most valuable assets and aims to be beneficial to them.
kurumsal-p2: The ecosystem, in our view, is a value borrowed from future generations; therefore, Narmanlı Furniture pays special attention to activities aimed at protecting the ecosystem and aims to pass on the environment we live in to future generations in its natural state.
kurumsal-p3: Narmanlı Furniture approaches its activities in all business processes and methods with scientific and objective principles.
kurumsal-p4: Universal values are the common property of humanity. From the perspective of world peace, these values increase respect, love and cooperation among people. Narmanlı Furniture aims to protect and sustain these values.
kurumsal-p5: The concept of institutionalization at Narmanlı Furniture is based on individuals being in the foreground. Importance is given to the implementation of institutional behaviors in employee and customer relations and the equal application of principles to everyone. Business ownership and business identity are separate elements.
kurumsal-p6: It is not bound by perfectionist principles; it is based on the philosophy that better is always possible and innovations are implemented within the organization as much as possible.
kurumsal-p7: It believes that customer satisfaction starts with employee satisfaction. Employees are internal customers and their satisfaction translates into external customer satisfaction.
kurumsal-p8: According to Narmanlı Furniture, teamwork is important for business success. The team spirit supports the development of economic and social relations among people; sharing joys and sorrows makes an important contribution to the happiness and motivation of individuals.
misyon-p1: Narmanlı Furniture aims to make people's living spaces not only functional but also enjoyable and aesthetic. Each of our products is designed to make the user's daily life easier and increase their happiness.
misyon-p2: We aim to raise the living standards of individuals by offering ergonomics and aesthetic harmony together in our products. The solutions we design for kitchen and living areas are structured according to the needs of users.
misyon-p3: We value the ideas and competencies of our employees, and by supporting them, we reflect new technologies and design approaches in our products. This way, we both increase internal motivation and produce innovations that make a difference in the industry.
misyon-p4: Our mission is not limited to just producing products; creating a work culture that respects human rights and ethical values, and contributing to society and the industry are also our main goals.
misyon-p5: With production processes sensitive to nature and the future, we care for the long-term happiness of both users and the environment.
misyon-p6: Narmanlı Furniture places people, nature and society at the center while transforming living spaces; it aims to contribute to the happiness of every individual with ergonomic, aesthetic and innovative solutions.
vizyon-p1: It aims to enter the top three in the national market within the next five years in its natural category, setting the direction for the industry and maintaining its leadership and innovative structure.
vizyon-p2: In the long term, it aims to rise to a leading position in international markets as well.
vizyon-p3: Making a difference in the industry with new product designs and technological solutions.
vizyon-p4: Being a brand that respects the ecosystem with environmentally friendly production processes and material use.
vizyon-p5: Continuously increasing customer satisfaction and strengthening brand loyalty.
vizyon-p6: Strengthening team spirit and corporate culture by increasing employees' competencies.
vizyon-p7: Increasing efficiency with digitalization and smart solutions and being a pioneer in the industry.
vizyon-p8: Being a brand recognized and preferred in international markets.
vizyon-p9: Adding value to society and the industry with social responsibility projects.
slogan-desc: We act in line with the principle of "We are different to live differently." In cases where differences cannot be adequately reflected in today's mass production, we offer solutions for individuals to express their own lifestyles in an original way. We believe that every individual has the right to reflect their own difference in their living space.
slogan-p1: It aims to develop designs that reflect the unique lifestyles of users.
slogan-p2: It emphasizes that difference is a corporate value by centering each individual's unique preferences and expectations.
slogan-p3: By offering aesthetics and functionality together, it enables users to have a higher quality experience in their living spaces.
urun-desc: Every product is based on an idea. Products are the aesthetic and concrete forms of ideas. The source of Narmanlı Furniture's product concepts is creativity, thought and the integration of humans with nature. Based on this fundamental idea, the following product concepts have been created.
urun-p1: In creating this product concept, Narmanlı Furniture aims to concretely present innovations that people can see in their dreams. It is Narmanlı Furniture's highest level product concept.
urun-p2-title: WORLD OF HAPPINESS (THE WORLD OF HAPPINESS):
urun-p2: It produces products that respond to situations where people consider being original and unique as an important privilege and enjoy accomplishments that cannot be imitated. Basic idea: Every person can reach products that will make themselves and their environment happy by optimally using their economic means.
urun-p3-title: WORLD OF REALITY (THE WORLD OF REALITY):
urun-p3: It is the third product segment. Today, it is about low-income people trying to meet their needs by purchasing certain products despite their limited economic means. Although it mostly includes standardized products, it offers people difference and originality.
urun-p4: The fourth of our branded product segment, Narmanlı door, also demonstrates its difference in this field with solutions that make and beautify the life of the interior.
vision-li1-text: Aiming to shape the industry by entering the top three in the national market within the next five years and maintaining its leadership through continuous innovation.
vision-li2-text: Aiming to rise to a leading position in international markets in the long term.
vision-li3-text: Creating a difference in the sector with new product designs and technological solutions.
vision-li4-text: Becoming a brand that respects the ecosystem through eco-friendly production processes and material use.
vision-li5-text: Continuously increasing customer satisfaction and strengthening brand loyalty.
vision-li6-text: Strengthening team spirit and corporate culture by enhancing employee competencies.
vision-li7-text: Increasing efficiency and leading the sector through digitalization and smart solutions.
vision-li8-text: Becoming a recognized and preferred brand in international markets.
vision-li9-text: Adding value to society and the sector through social responsibility projects.
concepts-description: Every product is based on an idea. Products are the aesthetically gained and embodied forms of ideas. The source of Narmanlı Furniture's product concepts is creativity, thought, and the integration of human with nature. Based on this core philosophy, the following product concepts have been established.
concepts-li1-text: Narmanlı Furniture aims to tangibly present the innovations people can see in their dreams. This is the highest-tier product concept of Narmanlı Furniture.
concepts-li2-text: It produces products for those who see being original and unique as a privilege. This concept offers the happiness consumers deserve through various raw materials and technology combinations. Key idea: Everyone can reach products that make them happy by using their means optimally.
concepts-li3-text: The third product segment. No matter how limited the means, this concept contributes to happiness. Although it includes more standardized products, it still offers uniqueness and originality.
concepts-li4-text: The fourth of our branded segments, Narmanlı doors show their difference through solutions that make interior living easier and more beautiful.
slogans-description: We act in line with the principle of "We are different to live differently." In cases where mass production fails to reflect uniqueness, we offer solutions for individuals to express their lifestyles authentically. We believe every individual has the right to reflect their own difference in their living space.
slogans-li1-text: Aims to develop designs that reflect users' unique lifestyles.
slogans-li2-text: Emphasizes that difference is a corporate value by centering on each individual's unique preferences and expectations.
slogans-li3-text: Enables users to have a more qualified experience in their living spaces by offering aesthetics and functionality together.
